ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory (if applicable) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing category */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category or subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the clothing item */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item is currently available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the customer */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer (e.g., athletic, hourglass) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Recommended size */,
  "fit_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the fit accuracy (1-10) */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on measurements, customer feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item */,
  "price_at_purchase" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of purchase */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., sales, customer engagement) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., sales, customer engagement, returns) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view orders, manage inventory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "user_role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was received */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was received */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
